title: Indonesia Taps Insider to Revive World’s Worst Stock Market

summary: Gold steadied, with support stemming from the signing of an interim peace deal between the US and Iran offset by hawkish comments from the new head of the Federal Reserve.

title: First Saudi Supertankers Start Leaving Hormuz After Deal
title_cn: 交易完成后，第一艘沙特超级油轮开始离开霍尔木兹
summary: Three Saudi supertankers were among a growing list of vessels exiting the Strait of Hormuz in an early sign of rising flows after the US and Iran’s interim peace deal, although some trade groups warned that their members needed more clarity on mines and other practicalities.

title: Qatar Brings Empty LNG Ship Back for First Time Since War Began
title_cn: 卡塔尔自战争开始以来首次带回空液化天然气船
summary: Qatar brought an empty liquefied natural gas tanker back into the Persian Gulf through the Strait of Hormuz for the first time since the war in Iran began, a sign that the key producer is preparing to ramp up exports.

title: Czechs Mull First Rate Hike Since 2022 to Curb Price Risks
title_cn: 捷克考虑自2022年以来首次加息以遏制价格风险
summary: The Czech central bank may raise interest rates for the first time in four years as policymakers weigh domestic inflation pressures against receding risks from global energy prices.

title: Warsh's Debut Sparks Surge in Hike Bets
title_cn: 沃什的首次亮相引发加息投注激增
summary: Traders piled into betting on interest-rate hikes as soon as next month after Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh clear the central bank won’t tolerate high inflation. The hawkish message was driven home by the projections of individual Fed members. Bloomberg's Alister Bull reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Copper Falls After Fed Chairman Warsh Positions as Inflation Hawk
title_cn: 美联储主席沃什担任通胀鹰派后铜价下跌
summary: Copper fell more than 1% to wipe out the gains of earlier this week after US Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh sparked speculation about rate hikes.

title: Oil Falls as Iran Peace Deal Gets Tankers Moving Through Hormuz
title_cn: 伊朗和平协议使油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡，油价下跌
summary: Oil fell and gasoline sank after the US and Iran agreed to settle a months-long conflict that triggered the biggest supply disruption in history, and some vessels were seen making their first crossings of the Strait of Hormuz since the war began.

title: East Asian Refiners Eye Fuel Sales Boost Before Hormuz Reopen
title_cn: 东亚炼油商希望在霍尔木兹海峡重新开放之前增加燃料销售
summary: Refineries in East Asia are starting to ramp up fuel exports after months of holding back and prioritizing local sales, in what appears to be an attempt to front-run the market before the Strait of Hormuz reopens.

title: Latvian PM says EU Needs Ukraine Peace Talks Envoy
title_cn: 拉脱维亚总理表示欧盟需要乌克兰和平谈判特使
summary: “Europe has to be at the table,” Kulbergs said in an interview with Bloomberg TV on Thursday in Brussels. “There should be one person if the peace talks are in place who has the political mandate to do that.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Shares Soar After Trump Says It Struck Apple Chip Deal
title_cn: 特朗普表示与苹果达成芯片交易后英特尔股价飙升
summary: Intel Corp.’s stock surged more than 9% in premarket trading Thursday after US President Donald Trump said the chipmaker will work alongside Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.

title: Fed’s Warsh Rocks Bond Market in Debut, Sparks Surge in Rate-Hike Bets
title_cn: 美联储沃什首次亮相震撼债券市场，引发加息押注激增
summary: Traders piled into betting on interest-rate hikes as soon as next month after Kevin Warsh used his debut press conference as Federal Reserve chairman to make clear the central bank won’t tolerate high inflation.

summary: Hong Kong is set to launch China government bond futures amid Beijing’s efforts to promote global yuan usage and attract foreign capital.

title: Hamptons Golf Tickets At $400 Look Like A Steal After the Knicks

summary: With Knicks NBA Finals seats and World Cup tickets costing thousands, golf's US Open in the Hamptons is emerging as a rare bargain. Paulina Cachero breaks down the numbers (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EQT Buys UK’s Intertek for £9.3 Billion in Latest LSE Exit
title_cn: EQT 最新退出伦敦证券交易所以 93 亿英镑收购英国 Intertek
summary: Intertek Group Plc agreed to a £9.3 billion ($12.3 billion) takeover bid from private equity firm EQT AB, a deal that will mean another British company leaves the London stock market.

title: Goldman’s Kaplan Says Fed May Need to Hike as Soon as September
title_cn: 高盛卡普兰表示美联储可能需要尽快在 9 月加息
summary: The Federal Reserve may need to raise interest rates as soon as September if inflation remains elevated, according to Rob Kaplan, vice chairman at Goldman Sachs Group Inc. and former Dallas Fed president.

title: Atomic Lab Sounds Alarm on Screwworm Spread Across the Americas
title_cn: 原子实验室对螺旋虫在美洲传播发出警报
summary: A key international nuclear lab helping to eradicate the New World screwworm says more sterile flies and better coordination with southern neighbors is needed to prevent the deadly parasite from spreading across North America.

title: Second Iran-Bound Corn Ship Crossed Hormuz Before Peace Deal
title_cn: 第二艘开往伊朗的玉米船在和平协议前穿越霍尔木兹海峡
summary: A second ship laden with corn bound for Iran transited the Strait of Hormuz just hours before the US-Iran interim deal to end the war and reopen the waterway was announced.

title: Citi Sees $80 Billion Flows to India After RBI Capital Push
title_cn: 印度央行注资后，花旗预计将有 800 亿美元流入印度
summary: India could attract as much as $80 billion in foreign capital by year-end after the central bank unveiled measures to make the economy more attractive to overseas citizens and investors, according to Citigroup Inc.’s top banker in the country.

title: JPMorgan Warns Chip Stock Rally Poses Risk of Market ‘Tantrums’
title_cn: 摩根大通警告芯片股上涨带来市场“发脾气”的风险
summary: The risk of market “tantrums” is rising as sharp swings in semiconductor stocks force some investors to cut allocations, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co. strategists.

title: China Stock Gauge Nears Bear Market on Weak Growth, Tech Slide
title_cn: 中国股市因增长疲弱而接近熊市，技术下滑
summary: A major Chinese stock gauge is on the cusp of a bear market, underscoring deepening concerns about the country’s growth outlook and the underperformance of its heavily weighted Internet and consumer firms.

title: Qantas CEO Touts Ultra Long Haul Flight Demand
title_cn: 澳洲航空首席执行官吹捧超长途航班需求
summary: "We will have five A350's by November of next year that will enable us not long after Sydney and London to start Sydney and New York." CEO Vanessa Hudson speaks to Anna Edwards and Guy Johnson from Toulouse on 'Bloomberg: The Opening Trade'. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lawyer Takes Fight to Keep Kids Off Social Media From Courthouse to Political Arena
title_cn: 从法院到政治舞台，律师努力阻止孩子们远离社交媒体
summary: Matthew Bergman pitched UK officials to protect kids from social media harms

title: Big Tech’s AI Spending Spree Is Making Stock Buybacks Disappear
title_cn: 大型科技公司的人工智能支出热潮正在使股票回购消失
summary: The artificial-intelligence race is becoming so expensive that it’s snuffing out one of the key forces that has helped keep Big Tech stocks soaring for years: steady share buybacks.

title: Europe Scales Down AI Ambitions With Smaller Data Center Tender
title_cn: 欧洲通过缩小数据中心招标规模来缩小人工智能野心
summary: The European Union downsized plans for data centers to support artificial intelligence, outlining a call for tenders that includes smaller-scale facilities than originally envisioned.

title: Swiss AI Startup Prem Is Raising $100 Million Series A Round
title_cn: 瑞士人工智能初创公司 Prem 筹集 1 亿美元 A 轮融资
summary: Prem AI, a Swiss startup that helps companies including hedge funds and law firms run artificial intelligence models on their own private infrastructure, is raising $100 million in a Series A funding round.

title: Europe Wants AI in Manufacturing Before Its Workforce Retires
title_cn: 欧洲希望在劳动力退休之前将人工智能引入制造业
summary: As factory workers retire, Europe’s industries turn to AI to fill the coming labor gap.

title: AI for Industry Is Europe’s Hope to Salvage Manufacturing Edge
title_cn: 工业人工智能是欧洲挽救制造业优势的希望
summary: Pressure to become more efficient has Europe racing to bring artificial intelligence to the shop floor.

title: AI Company Dream Triples Value to $3 Billion in Funding Round
title_cn: AI 公司 Dream 在本轮融资中估值增加三倍至 30 亿美元
summary: Dream, an Israeli artificial intelligence company that provides AI and cybersecurity services to governments and critical infrastructure operators, has raised $260 million at a $3 billion valuation.

title: SpaceX Shares Waver After Posting First Decline Since IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 股价自首次公开募股以来首次下跌后股价动摇
summary: SpaceX shares fluctuated in premarket trading following the previous session’s drop, as it wraps up its first week as a public company following a record-breaking listing.

title: Jeremy Grantham on How to Tell if a Bubble's About to Burst | Odd Lots
title_cn: 杰里米·格兰瑟姆 (Jeremy Grantham) 谈如何判断泡沫是否即将破裂 |零股
summary: Jeremy Grantham, co-founder and long-term strategist of GMO, has a long history of calling bubbles. As he recounts in his new memoir, The Making of a Permabear: The Perils of Long-Term Investing in a Short-Term World, that includes spotting the dot-com bubble of the early 2000s, which some people see as analogous to the current excitement over AI. And when it comes to today's market, there are a lot of signs of frothiness you could point to. In this episode, we speak to Grantham about how he sees markets right now, including a watershed change for Big Tech stocks, the signs he watches out for to spot when a bubble might burst, and what really keeps him up at night. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Plurimi CIO Sees Value in AI Supply Chain
title_cn: Plurimi 首席信息官看到人工智能供应链的价值
summary: Plurimi Wealth Chief Investment Officer Patrick Armstrong says he sees value in the artificial intelligence supply chain, stocks such as Micron, Samsung and Nvidia. "We're underweight the Magnificent Seven — the hyperscalers — those are the companies that are spending a trillion dollars over the next 12 months on AI datacenters," Armstrong tells Bloomberg Television. "And we own the companies they're giving the money to." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China AI Lab’s 170% Stock Surge Cements Winner-Loser Pair Trade
title_cn: 中国人工智能实验室股价暴涨170% 巩固赢家与输家配对交易
summary: A pair trade is emerging in China’s artificial intelligence sector, with investors piling into the perceived winner and betting against its rival seen as losing ground in the race to build commercially viable AI models.

title: Blackstone’s AirTrunk Seeks $3 Billion Loan for Sydney Project
title_cn: Blackstone 的 AirTrunk 为悉尼项目寻求 30 亿美元贷款
summary: AirTrunk Pty., a data center operator backed by Blackstone Inc., is in talks with banks for a A$4.3 billion ($3 billion) loan to back a new project in Australia, people familiar with the matter said, as it continues its debt-fueled expansion across Asia Pacific.

title: Anthropic Ban Forces Investor Rethink of Political Risk
title_cn: 人为禁令迫使投资者重新思考政治风险
summary: Investors in the ever-hotter AI stock rally must suddenly consider a risk with the potential to be even more damaging than high valuations and big spending: Politics getting in the way.

title: Kingboard’s 570% Rally Is Being Powered by Mainland Investors
title_cn: 建滔570%涨势由内地投资者推动
summary: Chinese investors have fueled a surge in shares of newfound AI darling Kingboard Laminates Holdings Ltd., more than doubling their stake in the company to 13% this year, according to the latest stock exchange data.

title: Lenovo Raises $2 Billion From Seven-Year Convertible Bonds
title_cn: 联想通过七年期可转换债券筹集 20 亿美元
summary: Lenovo Group Ltd. fetched $2 billion from the sale of seven-year convertible bonds, two years after it raised a similar amount from Saudi Arabia’s sovereign wealth fund.

title: Circles Sold Phone Spy Tools to Repressive States, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，Circles 向专制国家出售电话间谍工具
summary: A Bulgaria-based company sold controversial surveillance technology to governments in countries with records of repression, enabling authorities to track mobile phones and eavesdrop on private communications, according to documents obtained by Human Rights Watch.

title: Korea Rejects Baemin, Coupang Settlement Bids in Antitrust Probe
title_cn: 韩国拒绝 Baemin、Coupang 反垄断调查和解请求
summary: South Korea’s antitrust watchdog has rejected settlement proposals from the country’s two largest food delivery platforms, Baedal Minjok and Coupang Eats, leaving both firms exposed to potentially significant fines over alleged unfair business practices.

title: Star Google Researcher Joins OpenAI in Coup for ChatGPT Creator
title_cn: 谷歌明星研究员与 OpenAI 联手打造 ChatGPT Creator
summary: One of Google’s most prominent researchers is leaving for rival OpenAI, dealing a setback to Alphabet Inc. in a multibillion-dollar race to build the world’s most powerful artificial intelligence models.

title: AI Startup Midjourney Pivots to Health With Ultrasound Machine
title_cn: 人工智能初创公司中途通过超声波机转向健康
summary: AI startup Midjourney Inc. announced its first hardware project at an event in San Francisco, outlining an unexpected move into the personal health and medical industries.

title: Hutong Research's Guo on PBOC Policy, Yuan
title_cn: 胡同研究郭元谈央行政策
summary: Guo Shan, Partner at Hutong Research, discusses the potential shift from China's central bank in its interest rate framework and the outlook for the yuan. She speaks with Minmin Low on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stevenson on Fed Keeping Rates Steady
title_cn: 史蒂文森谈美联储保持利率稳定
summary:
Betsey Stevenson, Professor of Public Policy and Economics at the University of Michigan and former chief economist at the US Department of Labor, discusses her outlook for the US economy and says the Fed will continue to keep rates on hold for a while. She speaks with Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade".
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hillhouse Seeks $600 Million Loan to Fund DayOne Investment
title_cn: 高瓴资本寻求 6 亿美元贷款资助 DayOne Investment
summary: Asset manager Hillhouse Investment is in talks with banks for a loan of about $600 million to fund its investment in data center operator DayOne Data Centers Ltd., according to people familiar with the matter.

title: BWX Agrees to License Nuclear Reactor Design After Activist Push
title_cn: 在活动人士推动下，BWX 同意获得核反应堆设计许可
summary: BWX Technologies Inc. has struck a deal to license its design for a small modular reactor, after activist investor Ananym Capital Management pushed the nuclear technology company to consider commercializing it.

title: Microsoft Makes Big AI Inroads in China by Selling OpenAI Models
title_cn: 微软通过销售 OpenAI 模型大举进军中国人工智能市场
summary: Microsoft Corp. has built a big business selling AI models to Chinese companies despite the growing rivalry between the US and China over artificial intelligence.

title: Stocks Fall as Traders See Fed Hike by October | The Close 6/17/2026
title_cn: 交易员预计美联储十月加息，股市下跌收盘价 2026 年 6 月 17 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are DoubleLine Capital Portfolio Manager Ken Shinoda, Former Federal Reserve Vice Chair Alan Blinder, The Conference Board Chief Economist Dana Peterson, Former FDIC Chair Sheila Bair, & Barings’ High Yield Portfolio Manager Kelly Burton. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Looks to Expand Nuclear Power as AI Drives Up Energy Demand
title_cn: 人工智能推高能源需求，美国寻求扩大核电
summary: Ho K. Nieh, chair of the US Nuclear Regulatory Committee, said that the NRC has taken 'major steps' to reform its framework for licensing nuclear plants and how it conducts regulatory checks as the Trump administration looks to increase the amount of nuclear energy projects in the United States. Nieh said that despite reforms the NRC remains a 'strong regulator' and could not yet reveal which regulations were under review.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. FDIC Chair Bair: Warsh Gets A+ for 1st Fed Meeting
title_cn: 先生。 FDIC 主席拜尔：沃什在第一次美联储会议上获得 A+
summary: Sheila Bair, former FDIC Chair and Senior Fellow at the Center for Financial Stability, shared her assessment of Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh's first meeting and press conference. Bair commended Warsh for his measured and judicious communication, particularly his firm commitment to price stability and cautious approach to economic projections. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Shares Fall for First Time Since Blockbuster Debut
title_cn: SpaceX 股价自重磅上市以来首次下跌
summary: SpaceX shares declined for the first time since its record initial public offering, snapping a three-day rally that had reached nearly 50%.

title: Lithuania Agrees to Chinese Diplomatic Office After Taiwan Row
title_cn: 立陶宛在台湾争端后同意中国外交办公室
summary: Lithuania dropped its opposition to China’s plans to establish a lower-level representation in the Baltic nation, signaling a willingness to restore ties after a rupture over Taiwan.

title: Israel Foreign Minister Severs Ties With EU’s Top Diplomat
title_cn: 以色列外长与欧盟高级外交官断绝关系
summary: Israel’s foreign minister said he was cutting off all contact with the European Union’s top diplomat, Kaja Kallas, citing her “blatant unfairness” and underscoring the Jewish state’s growing isolation from many of its closest allies.

title: Trump Signs Iran Deal, Shifting Focus to Hormuz and 60-Day Talks
title_cn: 特朗普签署伊朗协议，将焦点转向霍尔木兹和 60 天会谈
summary: US President Donald Trump formally agreed an interim peace deal with Iran, shifting focus to the planned reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and a complex 60-day negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program.

title: First Saudi Supertankers Begin Hormuz Crossing
title_cn: 第一批沙特超级油轮开始穿越霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Some oil and gas vessels have begun to cross the Strait of Hormuz, including ships owned by Saudi Arabia’s state tanker giant. The movement of Saudi ships through the waterway marks the first large volumes of Saudi oil to cross the strait since the Iran war began. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Iran Deal Needs a Nuclear Mousetrap
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗协议需要一个核捕鼠器
summary: Interim pact opens the door for 60 days of talks that will show who wins the debate on Iran.

title: How an Oil Outsider Became Shale’s Staunchest Defender
title_cn: 石油局外人如何成为页岩最坚定的捍卫者
summary: Known for his public candor, Diamondback Energy boss Kaes Van’t Hof is advocating for shale as the Iran war stokes market volatility.

title: Record Ukrainian Drone Attack on Moscow Targets Refinery
title_cn: 乌克兰无人机对莫斯科炼油厂发起创纪录袭击
summary: Russia’s capital faced a record air bombardment overnight, with drones reaching the Moscow Oil Refinery, disrupting airport operations and forcing the closure of several major roads in and around the city.

title: NATO Plans to Modernize Nuclear Assets and Improve Planning
title_cn: 北约计划实现核资产现代化并改进规划
summary: NATO will modernize its nuclear capabilities and improve planning, the alliance’s defense ministers said on Thursday in a rare statement on an area of deterrence that’s gaining more focus as the US scales down conventional military presence in Europe.

title: Trump Ally Vowing Death to Cartels Closes In on Colombia Presidency
title_cn: 特朗普盟友誓言消灭卡特尔 哥伦比亚总统任期临近
summary: In a victory speech delivered from behind a bulletproof screen, on a barge in a Caribbean river estuary, Abelardo de la Espriella vowed to hunt down Colombia’s worst criminals.

title: Trump Poised to Roll Out New Tariffs as He Refunds the Old Ones
title_cn: 特朗普准备在退还旧关税的同时推出新关税
summary: Tariff revenue is now flowing out of the US Treasury’s coffers faster than it’s coming in, with nearly $22 billion in unlawfully collected duties reimbursed to importers in May.

title: US Starts Six-Months Review of Troops in Europe After Deep Cuts
title_cn: 美国在大幅削减后开始对欧洲驻军进行为期六个月的审查
summary: The US will kick off a review of its military presence in Europe, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said, weeks after Washington rattled its allies with a plan for deep cuts to American military support for the continent.

title: NATO Deploys SAMP/T Missile System to Turkey in Boost to Defense
title_cn: 北约在土耳其部署 SAMP/T 导弹系统以加强防御
summary: NATO deployed an Italian SAMP/T missile-defense system in the central Anatolian city of Konya to reinforce the alliance’s air defense, Turkey’s Defense Ministry said on Thursday.

title: India Treads Cautiously as Trump Seeks Fresh Start With Modi
title_cn: 特朗普寻求与莫迪重新开始，印度谨慎行事
summary: US President Donald Trump showered Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi with praise in their first in-person meeting in more than a year.

title: Inside the Chaotic Iran Talks That Let Trump Claim Victory, But Not Yet Peace
title_cn: 混乱的伊朗谈判让特朗普声称胜利，但尚未实现和平
summary: The result of weeks of intense diplomacy, the interim agreement between the US and Iran puts off many of the thorniest issues.

title: Trump Signs US-Iran Deal, Warsh Fuels Fed Rate Hike Bets | Daybreak Europe 6/18/2026
title_cn: 特朗普签署美伊协议，沃什助长美联储加息押注黎明欧洲 6/18/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

President Donald Trump signed an interim deal to end the war with Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, speeding up the timeline for the agreement to go into effect despite blowback from Republicans who said it amounted to a victory for Tehran.

Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh vowed to restore price stability following his first policy meeting since taking the helm of the US central bank, after officials left interest rates unchanged and signaled growing support for rate hikes this year.

Today's guests: Jackie Bowie, Head of EMEA, Chatham Financial; Chloé Poisbeau, COO, Alice & Bob. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Switzerland Loses Top Competitiveness Ranking to Singapore
title_cn: 瑞士的竞争力排名被新加坡夺走
summary: Switzerland lost its position as the world’s most competitive economy to Singapore, slipping to third place in the ranking as high US trade tariffs and a strong Swiss franc hurt investment flows.

title: Alice & Bob's Poisbeau on Quantum Computing
title_cn: 爱丽丝和鲍勃关于量子计算的泊博
summary: Alice & Bob COO Chloé Poisbeau discusses their agreement with France for the the world’s first acquisition of a quantum computer based on cat-qubit technology. She spoke with Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie from the VivaTech 2026 conference in Paris, during Bloomberg Daybreak Europe. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Gasoline Prices Jump as Ukraine Strikes Refineries
title_cn: 乌克兰袭击炼油厂导致俄罗斯汽油价格上涨
summary: Russian gasoline prices advanced further, with Ukrainian attacks on refineries forcing some filling stations to limit sales just as the summer vacation season gets underway.

title: Macron Calls for Regulation of Cutting-Edge AI Models
title_cn: 马克龙呼吁对尖端人工智能模型进行监管
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron led talks with Group of Seven leaders and tech executives on Wednesday to explore how to deploy the most advanced artificial intelligence models through so-called trusted partners. Speaking at a news conference in Evian, Macron warned of the dangers of cutting-edge AI models falling into the hands of "authoritarian regimes." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Piles Up Debt as Costs of War in Ukraine Outrun Budget
title_cn: 乌克兰战争成本超出预算，俄罗斯增加债务
summary: President Vladimir Putin frequently touts Russia’s lowest public debt among Group of 20 nations as a key strength of its economy. His war in Ukraine is starting to change that.

title: Taiwan President Appeals to World’s Media to Defy China Pressure
title_cn: 台湾总统呼吁世界媒体抵制中国压力
summary: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te appealed for the world’s media to defy China’s pressure campaign against Taipei, at a rare briefing convened as Beijing escalates its efforts to isolate the island.

title: Why Releasing Iran’s Assets Is a Political Headache for Trump
title_cn: 为什么释放伊朗资产是特朗普的政治难题
summary: The US for decades has pursued a campaign of pressuring Iran economically, including by deploying measures that have frozen billions of dollars of Iranian assets situated all over the world. Now, as part of a deal to end its three-month war with the country — which has threatened economies around the globe by curtailing access to oil, gas and fertilizer — the US is offering to facilitate the release of blocked Iranian funds.

title: Europe Tries to Take On China Without Launching a New Trade War
title_cn: 欧洲试图在不发动新贸易战的情况下对抗中国
summary: The Group of Seven industrial nations this week pledged an ambitious target to diversify away from China, adding momentum to the European Union’s own push to counter a growing trade imbalance with the world’s biggest export engine.

title: Citi Analyst Blasted by Indonesia Says Fiscal Risks Have Peaked
title_cn: 花旗分析师遭印尼炮轰称财政风险已见顶
summary: Fiscal and currency risks have likely passed in Indonesia, according to a Citigroup Inc. analyst who was once lambasted by the country’s finance chief for his forecasts.

title: Trump Says India Trade Deal ‘Very Close,’ Hails Modi as ‘Tough’
title_cn: 特朗普称印度贸易协议“非常接近”，称赞莫迪“强硬”
summary: US President Donald Trump and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi struck an upbeat tone at their first in-person meeting in more than a year, aiming to turn the page on recent strains caused by trade and other disputes.

title: Lee Says Korea-US Ties ‘Eternal’ as Trump Invites Him to Golf
title_cn: 李在镕称特朗普邀请他打高尔夫球，韩美关系“永恒”
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung said his country’s relationship with the US is “solid and eternal” after he spoke with President Donald Trump on the sidelines of the Group of Seven summit in France.

title: Trump Says India's Modi Is a 'Tough Negotiator'
title_cn: 特朗普称印度莫迪是一位“强硬的谈判者”
summary: President Donald Trump, speaking at a briefing alongside Narendra Modi at the G7 summit in France, says the Indian Prime Minister is a "tough negotiator." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Blows Through His Iran Red Lines in Justifying Peace Deal
title_cn: 特朗普突破伊朗红线为和平协议辩护
summary: President Donald Trump and his team had several red lines that they used to justify the US war against Iran. At a press conference on Wednesday, Trump largely brushed them aside.

title: Trump: Interim Deal to be Signed in Next 48 Hours | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/17/2026
title_cn: 特朗普：未来48小时内签署临时协议|权力平衡：最新版 06/17/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Senator Tina Smith (D-MN) says Republicans and Democrats on Capitol Hill are skeptical of President Trump's agreement with Iran. Senator Ted Budd (R-NC) says President Trump's push to attach the SAVE America Act to a FISA extension may make both bills harder to pass. Senator Dick Durbin (D-IL), says he won't presume the committee will "rubber stamp" Jamie McDonald's nomination for US attorney in Manhattan after President Trump put Jay Clayton's DNI confirmation on hold. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan’s Defense Chief Challenges China’s Military Spending Data
title_cn: 日本防卫大臣质疑中国军费数据
summary: Japan’s Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi questioned the accuracy of China’s official military spending figures in a fresh sign that Tokyo is taking a tougher line in response to Beijing’s claims that its regional rival is pursuing “new militarism.”
